lede: A look at March 8 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Kit Connor and Tommy Pham, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: International Women's Day
events.desc: International Women's Day marches in Mexico become violent with 62 police officers and 19 civilians injured in Mexico City alone.

events.title: Azure Window
events.desc: The Azure Window, a natural arch on the Maltese island of Gozo, collapses in stormy weather.

events.title: Malaysia Airlines Flight 370
events.desc: In one of aviation's greatest mysteries, Malaysia Airlines Flight 370, carrying a total of 239 people, disappears en route from Kuala Lumpur to Beijing. The fate of the flight remains unknown.

events.title: Cold War
events.desc: Cold War: While addressing a convention of Evangelicals, U.S. President Ronald Reagan labels the Soviet Union an "evil empire".

events.title: Voyager 1
events.desc: Images taken by Voyager 1 prove the existence of volcanoes on Io, a moon of Jupiter.

events.title: Nelson's Pillar
events.desc: Nelson's Pillar in Dublin, Ireland, is destroyed by a bomb.

events.title: Ba'ath Party
events.desc: The Ba'ath Party comes to power in Syria in a coup d'état.

events.title: Castle Gate Mine disaster
events.desc: A mine disaster kills 172 coal miners near Castle Gate, Utah.

events.title: Nader Shah
events.desc: Nader Shah, founder of the Afsharid dynasty, is crowned Shah of Iran.

events.title: Anne, Queen of Great Britain
events.desc: Queen Anne, the younger sister of Mary II, becomes Queen regnant of England, Scotland, and Ireland.

deaths.text: Athol Fugard, South African actor, director, and playwright
Ewald-Heinrich von Kleist-Schmenzin, German soldier and publisher
Johannes Diderik van der Waals, Dutch physicist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate
Christopher Wren, English architect, designed St. Paul's Cathedral

observances.text: Christian feast day: Edward King (Church of England)
International Women's Day, and its related observances: International Women's Collaboration Brew Day
